build.buildCommand: composer install --ignore-platform-reqs --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && mkdir -p data/cache data/log data/session public/docs-client/upload public/imgs-client/upload && chmod -R 755 data/cache data/log data/session public/docs-client/upload public/imgs-client/upload && cp config/init.php.dist config/init.php && cp public/.htaccess_original public/.htaccess && ./create-config.sh
